zh.title: 巴巴·万加预言全集 - 盲眼预言家对人类未来的85条预言与验证 | Baba Vanga Prophecies
zh.description: 保加利亚盲眼预言家巴巴·万加（1911-1996）留下的85条预言完整收录，涵盖自然灾害、战争、科技、宇宙探索等领域，从2025年延伸至5079年世界末日。已应验预言包括911事件、库尔斯克号沉没、奥巴马当选等。

en.title: Baba Vanga Prophecies - 85 Predictions from the Blind Mystic (1911-1996) | Full Archive & Verification
en.description: Bulgarian blind mystic Baba Vanga (1911-1996) left 85 prophecies spanning from 2025 to 5079, covering natural disasters, wars, technology, and cosmic events. Verified predictions include 9/11, Kursk submarine, Obama presidency, and more.
en.keywords: Baba Vanga,Baba Vanga predictions,blind mystic,Bulgarian prophet,Vanga prophecy,future predictions,end of world 5079,Baba Vanga verified,Nostradamus
